sigWerErrors.reason: 'sẵn' (ready) and 'săn' (hunt) are different words; this changes the meaning of the phrase and makes it confusing.
'rồi' (already) and 'hợp' (match/fit) are unrelated in meaning, which disrupts the intended meaning of the sentence.
'nhé' and 'nha' are both sentence-ending particles in Vietnamese with similar softening/encouraging tones; the meaning is not significantly changed.
